literature_expectation.expected_transport_trend: Long-range coupling should only be kept if it changes useful arrival in a material way.
literature_expectation.expected_role_of_disorder: Disorder can either blunt or amplify the effect of a longer coupling range.
literature_expectation.expected_role_of_phase_scrambling: If long-range coupling already bypasses bottlenecks, the environment may matter less.
literature_expectation.expected_failure_mode: If the long-range variant does not improve useful arrival, the added complexity is not earned.
